data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a link is added to both the calendar invite and the email confirmation. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that the generated link was included in the booking confirmation email, which is a critical part of the requirement. This gap indicates that the requirement is not fully covered, as the evidence does not support the claim that the link was included in the email, leading to a failure in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the generated link being included in the booking confirmation email.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
